strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience, significantly exceeding the 15-year minimum, with consistent progression through staff and senior roles
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, demonstrating active engagement with AI systems and emerging technical expertise in agentic workflows
Strong distributed systems and infrastructure background (microservices handling millions of requests/sec, CI/CD setup, Kubernetes) providing relevant foundation for cloud and systems engineering
concerns: AI expertise appears only in current role with no prior track record building AI products, platforms, or demonstrating sustained machine learning knowledge—critical gap for an 'AI Strategy' role
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification), and no formal educational credential in AI/ML to support strategic guidance on cutting-edge technologies

Limited demonstrated evidence of director-level strategic leadership: no customer advising experience, no documented influence on product strategy at enterprise scale, career focused on individual contributor engineering rather than organizational strategy
response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum experience requirement with 20 years of engineering work and possesses a relevant technical foundation in infrastructure, distributed systems, and cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes). His current role at re:cinq shows emerging engagement with AI-agent infrastructure. However, the role specifically demands 'AI Strategy' expertise with demonstrated products built with AI—qualifications Bogdan lacks. His AI experience is recent and infrastructure-focused rather than strategic. The resume shows strong individual-contributor engineering capabilities but limited evidence of director-level strategic influence, customer advisory relationships, or organizational leadership necessary for a Principal Engineer advising on cloud and AI strategy.
